# PosePerfect Mat™

> PosePerfect Mat™ is a photography posing mat with color-coded footprint guides that help clients stand correctly in seconds. It reduces repositioning time for headshots, school volume days, events, family sessions, and beginners.

- Site: https://poseperfectmats.com
- Merchant: Fail Up Inc. (https://failupinc.com)
- Support: support@failupinc.com · +1 305-424-8626
- Privacy: https://poseperfectmats.com/privacy
- Trademark: https://poseperfectmats.com/trademark

## Product summary

PosePerfect Mat™ (created with Chris Headshots) uses red / yellow / blue footprint marks on an anti-slip rubber mat so subjects know where to place their feet. Photographers spend less time saying “step left” and more time shooting usable frames.

Key facts:
- Standard size: 18" × 30"
- Junior size: for smaller subjects / second stations
- Branded and Unbranded Standard options
- Advanced Posing Guide ebook available
- Bundles: Family & Volume Pack (Standard + Junior), Mat + Guide Bundle
- Multi-buy volume discounts at Shopify checkout (2–5 mats)
- Social proof: 200+ verified Loox reviews on Fail Up Inc. (~4.6★)

## Primary offers (USD)

- PosePerfect Mat™ Standard Unbranded — $54.99
- PosePerfect Mat™ Standard Branded — $44.99
- PosePerfect Mat™ Junior Unbranded — $54.99
- Advanced Posing Guide (ebook) — $19.97
- Family & Volume Pack — $94.99
- Mat + Guide Bundle — $67.47

Checkout is completed on Fail Up Inc. Shopify hosted checkout after cart handoff from this site.

## Best-fit audiences

- Corporate / LinkedIn headshot studios
- School and sports volume photographers
- Event and photo-booth operators
- Family and mini-session photographers
- Beginner photographers learning repeatable posing

## How it works (short)

1. Place the mat where the subject should stand.
2. Ask them to match the colored footprints.
3. Frame / crop so feet stay out of the final hero crop when needed.
4. Repeat for every client without rebuilding tape marks.
